actionable_feedback: Include gating_change_log.md in the artifacts bundle and ensure it is listed in produced_deliverable_items and actual_outputs.json. The gating_change_log.md must contain row-level citations, mapping from packet rows to workbook rows, assumptions, and normalization details.
Provide a machine-readable actual_outputs.json alongside other artifacts (if not already packaged) and ensure actual_outputs.json produced_deliverable_items matches the artifact_content_previews.

Make the workbook programmatically verifiable: either (a) regenerate XLSX using a common library (openpyxl) so preview/parsing succeeds, or (b) include CSV/ODS exports of the calculations sheet(s) and a 'Calculations' sheet with plain numeric intermediate values and explicit formulas or calculated columns. Do not rely solely on custom OOXML XML packaging if previews cannot parse it.

Embed explicit row-level citations in the workbook or in gating_change_log.md: for every computed numeric result, show the packet row id(s) used, the inputs, normalization steps (explicit formula), the computed formula, and any sensitivity +/-5% variants.

Include per-record +/-5% sensitivity columns and explicit flags for expert-review triggers, and document the logic mapping sensitivity results to expert_review_required_by_5pct in both the workbook and gating_change_log.md.

Document remediation combination checks with explicit links to remediation_budget_usd and show per-combo costs and budget headroom calculations with row-level citations. Ensure the workbook or adjacent CSV contains these intermediate numeric values for verification.
Correct the artifact manifest / final_message to reflect actual files present (remove claims of files not included or ensure those files are actually attached).
After making the above changes, re-run deterministic precheck and the model grader and attach resulting logs (stdout/stderr and final_message) so verifiers can confirm consistency.
artifact_specific_comments: flow_gate_drift_report.xlsx: created via fallback OOXML writer; preview parse_status indicates 'openpyxl_unavailable' so formulas and row-level citations could not be verified by automated checks. Provide a parseable workbook or alternative CSV/Calculations sheet.

gating_change_log.md: trace and stdout claim it was written, but it is not present in the artifact_content_previews produced_deliverable_items list. Ensure it is actually included in the artifact bundle.

feedback_summary: The attempt produced the required XLSX artifact but the grader flagged semantic noncompliance because the gating_change_log.md was not present in the artifact previews/produced_deliverable_items and the workbook could not be programmatically inspected (openpyxl not available). Deterministic precheck passed artifact presence, but model-level grading failed due to unverifiable formulas, missing companion log, and manifest inconsistencies (stdout/final_message claim gating_change_log.md created but artifact previews do not include it). Resolve artifact packaging and verifiability issues and re-run precheck/grader.
